typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-dark_navy
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-dark_navy
typography.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-accent

effects.card_hover_style: hover:border-t-2 hover:border-t-accent hover:-translate-y-1 bg-white border-t-2 border-transparent

layout_rules.grid_system: Use CSS grid with grid-cols-1 for mobile, md:grid-cols-2 or lg:grid-cols-3 for desktop. Spacing gap-6 or gap-8.
layout_rules.mobile_nav: Hamburger menu required on mobile sizes.

sections.name: Navigation Bar
sections.specs: Sticky top, z-50. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90. Hamburger menu for mobile. Smooth scroll links.

sections.name: Hero
sections.specs: Two-column flex/grid. Left: H1 'Where Technology Meets Talent', primary CTA. Right: Animated CSS/SVG tech globe. Bottom: Trust bar with client name badges.

sections.name: About
sections.specs: Text section + 4 stat cards. Cards have white bg, large blue numbers, orange bottom borders.

sections.name: US IT Staffing Section
sections.specs: 3 staffing model cards in a grid. Inside cards: role chips, work authorization badges. Apply card_hover_style.

sections.name: India IT Staffing Section
sections.specs: 3 staffing model cards in a grid. Inside cards: role chips, India location list. Apply card_hover_style.

sections.name: Why Choose Midasis
sections.specs: 6 icon cards in a 3-col grid. Primary blue icons. Apply card_hover_style.

sections.name: Services
sections.specs: 6 icon cards in a 3-col grid. Primary blue icons. Apply card_hover_style.

sections.name: Vision Section
sections.specs: Solid primary blue background. White text centered. No orange used here.

sections.name: Clients Section
sections.specs: Styled text-based name badge cards for clients arranged in a wrapping flex container or marquee.

sections.name: Contact Section
sections.specs: 3 office address cards side-by-side above or beside a contact form. Form has a dropdown for requirement type. Inputs use white background.

sections.name: Footer
sections.specs: Dark navy background. White text. Multiple columns. Subtle light blue hover on links.

tech_globe_fallback.description: 3D wireframe globe for hero section (use as fallback if pure CSS/SVG globe is too complex, or use as subtle background texture in hero).

texture_bg.description: Subtle white frosted glass texture, use in background of hero or white sections if they need depth.

office_1.description: Two young professionals collaborating at a modern office workspace. Use for About or Contact section background accents (with heavy opacity overlay).

office_2.description: Women working on laptops in a bright office setting. Good for Staffing section backgrounds or Contact area.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce the orange-as-accent-only rule. NEVER use orange as a background fill for large sections, only for hover borders, underlines, or small text highlights.

Section padding must be exactly py-[80px] on desktop and py-[48px] on mobile. DO NOT use standard py-20/py-12 if they do not map to exactly 80px/48px in Tailwind config. Use arbitrary values to be safe.
All cards must use the EXACT shadow definition: shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(36,120,197,0.10)].
Cards MUST have a transparent top border by default that turns to #E87722 on hover using transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
Implement smooth scrolling via CSS (html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }).
Hero section MUST include an animated tech globe. Build this using CSS/SVG animations or Framer Motion.
Use Lucide-react for all standard icons.
Ensure the fonts (Montserrat for headings, Poppins for body) are imported from Google Fonts in the main index.css or layout.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role (e.g. data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Mobile menu must be a functional hamburger that opens a full-screen or sliding nav sheet.
Ensure all section backgrounds alternate flawlessly between #FFFFFF and #EBF4FB as defined in the section array, except Vision (#2478C5) and Footer (#0D2B4E).
